category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts catalogs of sources from astronomical images; official Astromatic page says SExtractor builds a catalogue of objects from astronomical images: https://www.astromatic.net/software/sextractor/
display_name_sources: Official Astromatic project page uses the name SExtractor: https://www.astromatic.net/software/sextractor/
docs_sources: Official Astromatic page links a User's Manual under Documentation; the ReadTheDocs site is the SExtractor User Manual and links back to GitHub: https://sextractor.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/astromatic/sextractor; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists CLI programs; source_facts.description and official Astromatic page describe astronomical image catalog/source extraction.
